arena.title: Arena Mode
arena.description: Send the same prompt to multiple AI models simultaneously. Compare responses side-by-side to find the best answer.

debate.title: Debate Mode
debate.description: Watch AI models discuss topics from different perspectives. A judge AI synthesizes the final verdict.
